name: 闺蜜
face_geometry: mild square-round facial structure with soft jawline and even cheekbones
hair_silhouette: clean medium-length straight hair reaching mid-back, side-parted
body_frame: average height with balanced shoulders and subtle hourglass figure
wardrobe_signature: lightweight knit blouse tucked into straight-leg pants
proportion_contract: standard adult human proportion with 1:8 head-to-body ratio
pairwise_forbidden_similarity: avoid EXTRA_PARENT's round or oval face, mid-length wavy hair, or trench coat elements; avoid SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN's rounded oval face, low ponytail, or faded white T-shirt; avoid EXTRA_TEACHER's rectangular face, shoulder-length straight hair, or uniform blouse-skirt combo; avoid LU_JINGCHEN's angular male face or wide-shouldered suit; avoid ZHAO_YIMING's narrow oval male face or tablet-holding pose

沈念歌低马尾或朴素T恤
高饱和色或休闲儿童服

appearance.facial_features: gently arched eyebrows, medium almond eyes, straight medium nose, soft full lips
appearance.hair: straight medium-length, smooth and glossy, parted on the side without volume at crown
appearance.skin: smooth fair complexion with natural subtle undertones
appearance.body: upright with slight side tilt, arms loosely at sides, medium bust and hips
appearance.expression: eyes mildly widened with interest, lips in subtle agreeing smile

costume.fixed_outfit: round-neck knit blouse with straight-leg trousers and flat ankle boots
costume.colors: soft pastel pink for top, muted taupe for pants, beige accessories
costume.materials: fine cotton-knit for blouse, wool-blend twill for trousers, soft leather for boots
costume.wardrobe_continuity: consistent refined urban casual across all appearances, no variations in formality

distinction_anchors: distinct from EXTRA_PARENT via milder face geometry and knit top over coat; distinct from SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN via straight hair and non-faded fabrics; distinct from EXTRA_TEACHER via non-professional skirt and varied facial roundness; distinct from male characters via feminine contours and clothing cuts

face shape drift to sharp ovals or rectangles
clothing era errors like pre-2000s styles or sci-fi elements
regional drift to Japanese urban suspense tones or aesthetics
portrait_prompt: Close-up portrait of a 30-35 years old Chinese woman in modern urban setting, mild square-round face with gently arched eyebrows, medium almond eyes, straight nose, soft lips in subtle smile, clean medium-length straight side-parted hair, smooth fair skin, balanced body in side-tilted listening pose, wearing soft pastel pink round-neck knit blouse and muted taupe straight-leg trousers, standard adult 1:8 head-to-body ratio, natural daylight lighting, no Japanese suspense vibe。比例契约：standard adult human proportion with 1:8 head-to-body ratio
